meaning: n.运送者,邮递员,带菌者,(自行车等)行李架,搬运器,航空母舰n.[电]载波(信号)
examples: They brought baby Michael along in a carrier.
He stooped to pick up the carrier bag of groceries.
American Airlines is the third-largest carrier at Denver International Airport.
By limiting carrier choices, Apple has given competing products an easier entrance into the market.
